headline: 3 Finance Stocks That Stole the Spotlight With Strong Q2 Gains
summary: HOOD, BEN and STT lead finance-sector gains in Q2 as retail trading, stronger AUM trends and supportive rates power investor optimism.

headline: The Smartest S&P 500 ETF to Buy With $1,000 Right Now
summary: When choosing between S&P 500 ETFs, the decision usually comes down to fees. This is one of the rare cases where Vanguard isn't the winner.
